case_title: PHILLIP HILL VS. FAXON GARAGE, INC

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HILL, PHILLIP ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-12-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FAXON GARAGE, INC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-01-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HILL, PHILLIP IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FAXON GARAGE, INC PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO MET ITS BURDEN TO SHOW THAT DEFENDANT PROVIDED SUBSTANDARD SERVICES IN THERMOSTAT REPAIR AND DIAGNOSTICS FOR OVERHEATING AND REVERSE GEAR ISSUES. PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENCE INDICATES LATER DIAGNOSTICS INDICATE THERMOSTAT IN WORKING ORDER. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT ESTABLISHED DEFENDANT CAUSED COOLANT PUMP LEAKS DISCLOSED BY MERCEDES-BENZ SAN FRANCISCO. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY HILL, PHILLIP FAXON GARAGE, INC
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT FAXON GARAGE, INC ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-01-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,000.00 FILED BY HILL, PHILLIP AS TO DEFENDANT FAXON GARAGE, INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-01-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT FAXON GARAGE, INC
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS:WALEE GON) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HILL, PHILLIP AS TO DEFENDANT FAXON GARAGE, INC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-01-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-01-2018 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ANDREA MCGARY. PLAINTIFF PHILLIP HILL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FAXON GARAGE INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED WALEE GON, PRESIDENT/OWNER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANDREA MCGARY; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
